18.sourceTitle: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - 44mm
18.evidenceText: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - 44mm; Utilizes Clik Valves for best-in-class performance; Increased durability, increased air flow, and intuitive connection
18.extractionRationale: One distinct third-party accessory product (Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit) is directly identified as being designed for Clik valves. Multiple color variants do not count as separate products.

27.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve kaufen - Top Auswahl - BIKE24
27.evidenceText: Four distinct product URLs identified: p1960182.html (Schlauch No. 19), p1859956.html (DV-SCV Ventile & Adapter), p1859949.html (Tubeless 60mm), p1859948.html (Tubeless 40mm)
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product page URLs from the 5 sources. Source 1 is a category filter page, not a product listing. Sources 2-5 represent 4 distinct product pages with unique p-numbers and product variants (tubed variants, tubeless variants, different sizes).

30.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Valve Core - gold | 2 Pieces | BIKE24
30.evidenceText: Product listings from bike24.com for CoreCap valve cores (gold and copper variants) do not contain stock status information in the provided content excerpts. No mention of out-of-stock, unavailable, or similar status indicators found.
30.extractionRationale: The provided text excerpts from both product listings are incomplete and do not include stock status information. Without explicit stock status indicators visible in the evidence, the percentage of out-of-stock listings cannot be determined.

37.sourceTitle: CoreCap Valve Cap Set - BBB Cycling
37.evidenceText: Product information Features Size guide Specifications Spare parts Find a dealer.
37.extractionRationale: The source mentions a "Spare parts" section exists on the page, but the actual list of distinct replacement/spare SKUs (valve cores, seals, o-rings, replacement kits) is not included in the provided content excerpt. Therefore, a specific count cannot be extracted.

41.evidenceText: Schwalbe has entered the space with its Clik Valve, aiming to make tyre inflation easier and more efficient through simpler
41.extractionRationale: The source does not contain specific data about which brands adopted Clik in 2026 or their 2027 specifications. 2027 specs are not yet available in the evidence provided, therefore returning null as per task instructions.

45.evidenceText: DT Swiss offers its own proprietary tubeless valves in various configurations (alloy black, brass silver) for different rim profile heights. No mention of Clik valve adoption. Evidence from DT Swiss shows they use their own valve system, not Clik valve.
45.extractionRationale: Based on the provided evidence, DT Swiss uses their own proprietary tubeless valve system and there is no mention of Clik valve adoption by DT Swiss or any other major wheelset brand. Since none of the major brands (DT Swiss, Mavic, Hunt, Zipp, ENVE, Roval) show evidence of adopting Clik valve as standard, the percentage is 0%.

49.evidenceText: 2026 Bergamont Grandurance LTD lists "Clik valve" for both Schwalbe tubes. 2026 Bergamont Grandurance 10 also lists "Clik valve" for both tubes. Other sources reference Herrmans Clik grips, not valves.
49.extractionRationale: Counted bicycle models listing Clik valve in valve specifications (not grip components). Found 2 models: Bergamont Grandurance LTD and Bergamont Grandurance 10, both explicitly stating "Clik valve" in their tube specifications. Sources 2, 3, and 5 mention Herrmans Clik but refer to grips/handlebars, not valve specifications.

50.evidenceText: From the 5 provided sources, distinct Clik valve pages are: (1) https://www.schwalbe.com/fr/technique-faq/tubeless/ - Tubeless FAQ mentioning Clik Valve, (2) https://www.schwalbe.com/en/technology-faq/valve/ - Valve FAQ about Clik Valve, (3) https://www.schwalbe.com/en/clik-valve/ - dedicated Clik Valve product page
50.extractionRationale: Counted unique page URLs that are specifically Clik valve technical documents, installation guides, or FAQ pages. Sources 4 and 5 are general product pages with only incidental Clik Valve mentions, not dedicated Clik documentation. Total distinct pages: 3

56.evidenceText: The provided sources reference Clik valve products and conversion kits but do not list specific inner tube models/SKUs that use the Clik valve interface. Sources 3-5 reference valve components (3532, 3530) which are valves, not inner tubes.
56.extractionRationale: The task requires counting distinct inner tube models/SKUs using Clik valve interface, explicitly excluding valves, conversion kits, and accessories. The evidence only contains information about Clik valve products themselves (valves in various lengths: 40mm, 80mm with SKUs 3530, 3532) and general promotional content about the valve technology. No inner tube product listings or models were found in the provided sources.

57.evidenceText: Product listing page for BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Ventilkern in multiple colors. No stock status, restock dates, or availability information provided in the content.
57.extractionRationale: The provided content shows a product listing page but contains no explicit information about current stock status, back-in-stock dates, or restock turnaround times. Without dates or explicit availability statements, the restock turnaround time cannot be determined.

61.sourceTitle: Aluminum - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News - Trading Economics
61.evidenceText: Aluminum fell to 3468.50 USD/T on April 2, 2026
61.extractionRationale: The source directly states the aluminum price as 3468.50 USD/T (USD per metric ton). This is the most recent spot price mentioned in the content dated April 2, 2026.
